creator: jayed@jayed.com
text:
Master download site has permanently moved.

Fix: 

Changed MASTER_SITES.  Updated pkg_descr with new URL.  Updated checksum (the only file changed is mxTextTools.pyd...looks like new compilation options).

Shar output available at http://www.mindspring.com/~lego/py-mxTextTools.txt
How-To-Repeat: make install from /sur/ports/textproc/py-mxTextTools
